persona: Young Asian woman, long dark hair, neutral linen dresses, never shows face directly

content_calendar.title: Bình Minh Yên Bình
content_calendar.description: Mai enjoys a quiet morning tea, with sunlight streaming through a window.
content_calendar.image_prompt: POV shot from slightly behind Mai's shoulder. A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a loose beige linen dress, sits by a window. Her hands gently cup a warm, handcrafted ceramic mug, steam softly rising. Soft golden morning light illuminates dust motes in the air, falling on a minimalist wooden table with a single sprig of dried lavender. The window view shows blurred, lush green foliage. photorealistic, cinematic lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, no text, no words.
content_calendar.video_prompt: Gentle camera push-in towards Mai. Steam subtly rises from the mug. Dust motes slowly dance in the sunlight.
content_calendar.sound_design: Gentle ceramic clink, soft sip, distant morning birdsong, faint rustling of linen.

content_calendar.title: Dạo Bước Rừng Thông
content_calendar.description: Mai walks through a sun-dappled pine forest, capturing the serene sounds.

Mai wears a long, olive green linen dress, her bare feet softly treading. The path winds gently, surrounded by ancient tree trunks and scattered pinecones. The light creates soft shadows and warm glows. photorealistic, cinematic lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, no text, no words.
content_calendar.video_prompt: Camera gently pans forward, following Mai's soft steps. Sun dapples slowly shift as if a gentle breeze moves the tree branches above. Slight sway of her linen dress.
content_calendar.sound_design: Soft crunch of pine needles, gentle breeze rustling leaves, distant birds chirping, faint forest ambiance.

content_calendar.title: Bếp Chay Thanh Đạm

A cast-iron pan sits warming on a stovetop in the soft, natural light from a window. Fresh herbs are bundled nearby. The scene is clean, wabi-sabi inspired. photorealistic, cinematic lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, no text, no words.

content_calendar.title: Trang Sách Chiều Thu

A minimalist ceramic cup of tea rests on a wooden coaster nearby. photorealistic, cinematic lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, no text, no words.

content_calendar.title: Mưa Rơi Trên Lá
content_calendar.description: The soothing sound and sight of rain falling on leaves.

The background is softly blurred with more rain and green foliage. A few larger raindrops are captured mid-fall. The overall feel is fresh, damp, and serene. No human visible. photorealistic, cinematic lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, no text, no words.

content_calendar.sound_design: Gentle rainfall on leaves, distant thunder rumble, soft wind whistling, a single slow drip.

content_calendar.title: Pha Trà Buổi Sáng

content_calendar.title: Hồ Nước Yên Lặng

The atmosphere is profoundly calm and peaceful. photorealistic, cinematic lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, no text, no words.
